accounts_not_configured_note: ACCOUNTS Device not configured, only monitoring DATA Device performance. Recommend configuring ACCOUNTS_DEVICE for complete storage performance analysis.
actual_io_overhead: Actual I/O overhead < 0.00005 IOPS/s, even with 4 decimal precision (%.4f) still shows as 0.0000
actual_vs_baseline_percentage: Percentage of actual performance vs baseline performance
adjust_system_config_per_recommendations: Adjust system configuration according to optimization recommendations
analyze_disk_under_qps: Analyze Disk storage performance bottlenecks under different QPS loads
available_connections_show_capacity: Available connections show remaining connection capacity, smaller values indicate greater connection pressure
baseline_configured_via_env: Disk performance baseline configured via environment variables
block_height_chart_not_generated: Block height sync chart not generated
bottleneck_condition_1:
Detection Dimensions (8 metrics):
  • Resource Metrics: CPU>85%, Memory>90%, Disk AWS Standard IOPS/Throughput>90%, Network>80%
  • RPC Performance (Mandatory Conditions): Success Rate<95% OR P99 Latency>1000ms
  • RPC Errors: Error Rate>5%, Connection Failures
bottleneck_condition_2:
5-Scenario Decision Logic:
  • Scenario A-Resource: Resource exceeded + Node healthy → False positive → Reset counter → Continue
  • Scenario A-RPC: RPC performance violated (mandatory) → True bottleneck → Accumulate count → 3 consecutive → Stop
  • Scenario B: Any bottleneck + Node unhealthy → True bottleneck → Accumulate count → 3 consecutive → Stop
  • Scenario C: No bottleneck + Node persistently unhealthy → Node failure → Stop immediately
  • Scenario D: All normal + Node healthy → Continue testing
bottleneck_condition_3:
Node Health Verification:
  • Criteria: Block height diff > 50 AND duration > 300s
  • Purpose: Distinguish false positives (Scenario A-Resource) from true bottlenecks (Scenario B)
  • Key Note: RPC performance violations are mandatory conditions and do NOT require node health verification
bottleneck_criteria_note: Framework uses 5-scenario logic with dual verification mechanism:
bottleneck_from_workload: Device bottleneck is mainly caused by business workload, monitoring system impact is negligible. Should optimize business logic or upgrade Disk configuration.
bottleneck_status_normal: No system-level bottleneck stop condition was triggered during testing. Although intermittent performance events may exist (see "Performance Warnings" below), the system is running normally and the node is syncing healthily.
